methods.description: A protocol developed to purify STIL from stigma/style exudates of tobacco pistils, involving multiple chromatography steps to isolate STIL from other compounds.

steps.description: Stigma/style exudates from tobacco pistils were extracted with methanol-chloroform and the aqueous phase was evaporated.
steps.searchable_summary: extract exudates using methanol-chloroform and evaporate aqueous phase

steps.description: The pellet was dissolved in water and loaded onto an anionic exchange column (MonoQ, GE Healthcare).
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve pellet in water and load onto anionic exchange column

steps.description: Fractions that induced LePRK2 dephosphorylation were pooled together, concentrated and subjected to solid-phase extraction on a C18 reverse-phase cartridge.
steps.searchable_summary: pool and concentrate active fractions, perform C18 solid-phase extraction

steps.description: The sample was loaded in 6% acetonitrile and the flowthrough was collected and freeze-dried.
steps.searchable_summary: load sample in acetonitrile, collect and freeze-dry flowthrough

steps.description: The pellet was dissolved in water and loaded onto an anion exchange column (MonoQ).
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve pellet in water and load onto anion exchange column

steps.description: The active fractions from the MonoQ column were pooled and subjected to UV-MALDI-TOF MS.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze pooled fractions using UV-MALDI-TOF MS

steps.description: A dilution series of pure STIL was assayed in the LePRK2 dephosphorylation assay.
steps.searchable_summary: perform dephosphorylation assay with STIL dilution series
